pi_items.source: Task description and ImageJ 'File > Open Samples' menu conventions
Analyzed https://imagej.net/images/mitosis.tif using Python tifffile, revealing 51 frames (shape 51, 5, 2, 196, 171)
Explicit requirement in task.json description and verifier.py ROI count validation logic
Explicitly defined in export_result.sh and task instructions
Explicitly defined in export_result.sh and task instructions

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard ImageJ 'Mitosis' sample, which is a real 5D microscopy dataset of a Drosophila S2 cell undergoing mitosis. Downloaded TIFF metadata confirms it contains exactly 51 time frames across 5 Z-slices and 2 channels. The export scripts and verifier strictly enforce the generation of an output CSV at '/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/time_series_traces.csv' containing roughly 51 rows corresponding to the frames, and a ZIP file at '/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/cell_rois.zip' containing a minimum of 3 distinct manually identified ROIs.
